post.description: Registers a new user, handles avatar upload via Cloudinary, and sends a verification email. All data except the avatar must be provided as multipart form fields.

email.description: Unique email address used for login and verification

avatar.description: Profile picture. Allowed formats: jpg, jpeg, png, gif. Max size: 5MB.

example.message: Registration successful! Please verify your email.

get.description: This endpoint confirms the user's email address using a unique token sent via email. After successful verification, the user can log in.

parameters.name: verificationToken
parameters.description: The unique hex token from the verification link

200.description: Email successfully verified or already verified

example.message: Verification token is invalid or expired

post.description: If a user didn't receive the initial verification email, this endpoint generates a new token and sends another email. Only works for unverified accounts.
Authenticates the user and returns a JWT token. Only verified users can log in.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid credentials or unverified email

get.description: Returns information about the user associated with the provided JWT token. Requires a valid Authorization header.

post.description: Sends an email with a reset link containing a temporary token. For security reasons, the server always returns a success message even if the email is not registered.

example.message: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.

post.description: Sets a new password for the user. Requires a valid reset token from the email. Successful reset will invalidate all current active sessions (log out the user from all devices).

parameters.name: resetToken
parameters.description: The temporary token sent via email

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid token or passwords don't match

value.message: Reset token is invalid or expired

post.description: Invalidates the current session by removing the JWT token from the user record in the database. Requires a valid Authorization header.

patch.description: Uploads a new avatar image. The file is processed (resized to 350x350, fill crop) and uploaded to Cloudinary, overwriting the previous one. Supported formats: jpg, jpeg, png, gif.

avatar.description: Image file to upload. Max size: 5MB.
New Cloudinary URL of the avatar

400.description: Bad Request - Missing file or invalid format

fields.avatar: Unsupported image format (use jpg,jpeg, png or gif)

patch.description: Allows an authenticated user to change their password. Checks if the old password is correct and ensures the new password is different from the old one. Invalidates the current session (token) upon success.

example.message: Password changed successfully. Please login again.

SameAsOld.summary: New password is same as old

delete.summary: Delete user account and all associated data
delete.description:
This is a destructive operation. It performs a full cleanup: 
1. Deletes the user profile and avatar from Cloudinary.
2. Deletes all user photos from the Gallery and Cloudinary storage.
3. Removes all user-related records from Documents, Maps, and StudyProgress collections.
4. Deletes the User record from the database.

200.description: Account and all data successfully deleted

get.description:
Returns a list of documents. 
- If the user is **authorized**: returns their personal documents. 
- If **unauthorized**: returns global document templates (isTemplate: true). 
Includes filtering by country and completion status.

post.description: Adds a new document to the user's collection. Validation is performed via Joi. The system prevents creating duplicate documents with the same name for the same owner.

fields.text: Document name must be at least 3 character long

put.description: Updates all fields of a document. If the provided data is identical to the current data in the database, the server will return a 400 error.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the document

400.description: Bad Request - Validation error or No changes detected

example.message: Document cannot be updated because it was not found

delete.description: Permanently removes a document from the user's collection. Returns the deleted document object on success.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the document to delete

404.description: Not Found - Document does not exist or wrong owner

patch.description: Updates only the 'done' status of a specific document. Requires authentication and a valid document ID.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the document to update

done.description: The new status of the document

404.description: Not Found - Unable to find or update document

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of photos. 
- **Authorized**: returns user's personal gallery photos. 
- **Unauthorized**: returns global gallery templates (isTemplate: true).

400.description: Bad Request - Page or limit are not numbers

example.message: Page and limit must be numbers

post.description: Allows an authenticated user to upload up to 10 photos at once. A description must be provided, which will be applied to all uploaded photos in the batch.

galleryPhotos.description: Array of image files (jpg, jpeg, png, gif). Maximum 10 files.

fields.galleryPhotos: Please, select at least one photo

delete.description: Permanently removes a photo from the database and Cloudinary storage. A user can only delete photos they own.

parameters.name: photoGalleryId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the gallery photo record

403.description: Forbidden - You do not own this photo

example.message: You don't have permission to delete this photo

404.description: Not Found - Photo already deleted or doesn't exist

example.message: Photo not found or already deleted

get.summary: Get study progress and available topics
get.description: Calculates statistics for a specific language level: total learned words, words marked for repeat, and a list of topics with word counts.

example.message: Invalid level: C1. Valid: A1, A2, B1, B2

get.summary: Get words for study or repeat
get.description:
Returns a list of words based on the mode: 
- **topic mode**: Returns all words for a specific level and topic. 
- **repeat mode**: Returns words marked as 'unknown' (inRepeat: true), sorted by the oldest 'lastSeenAt' date.

400.description: Bad Request - Missing parameters for topic mode

example.message: Parameters 'level' and 'topicName' are required for topic mode

post.summary: Submit an answer for a word
post.description:
Updates study progress for a specific word. 
- If result is **'unknown'**: word is added to the repeat queue (`inRepeat: true`). 
- If result is **'known'** and mode is **'repeat'**: word is removed from the repeat queue (`inRepeat: false`).

parameters.name: wordId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the word from StudyWord collection

example.message: Result must be one of: known, unknown

404.description: Not Found - Word ID does not exist

get.description:
Returns a list of map hotspots. 
- **Authorized**: returns user's custom points. 
- **Unauthorized**: returns global templates (isTemplate: true).
Supports filtering by map type (country).

post.description:
Adds a new point to the map. Features:
- Automatic **weatherQuery** generation (uses 'name' if not provided).
- Default **imageUrl** from system settings if empty.
- Prevents duplicate names for the same owner.

get.description:
Returns full details of a specific hotspot. 
- **Authorized**: access to personal hotspots or templates. 
- **Unauthorized**: access only to global templates.

404.description: Not Found - Hotspot does not exist or access denied

patch.description:
Updates hotspot fields. 

**Special Logic:**
- If **name** is changed but **weatherQuery** is not provided, weatherQuery will be updated automatically to match the new name.
- Returns **400 error** if the provided data is identical to the current data in the database.

parameters.name: hotspotId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the hotspot to update

400.description: Bad Request - No changes or validation error

fields.description: The Description must be at least 3 characters long

404.description: Not Found - Hotspot doesn't exist or wrong owner

example.message: Hotspot cannot be updated because it does not exist

delete.description: Permanently removes a hotspot from the map. Only the owner of the hotspot can perform this action.

parameters.name: hotspotId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the hotspot to delete

404.description: Not Found - Hotspot doesn't exist or not owned by user

example.message: Hotspot does not exist in this map

owner.description: User ID of the document owner. Null for templates.

text.description: Name or title of the document

DocumentUpdate.description: Schema for updating a document. At least one field must be provided.

total.description: Total number of photos matching the filter

weatherQuery.description: City name for weather data. Defaults to 'name' if empty.

HotspotUpdate.description: At least one field must be provided for the update.

weatherQuery.description: If not provided, will be synced with 'name'

fields.description: Specific field errors (e.g., { 'email': 'Invalid format' }). Can be null if not a validation error.

fields.password: Password must be at least 6 characters

example.message: Registration failed. Please try again later.
